text.title: Alert Deduplication Playbook Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Alert Deduplication Playbook methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: export-history
step.action: Export 30-day alert history (CSV / JSON / DB query).
step.decision-gate: If < 30 days available, mark thresholds as provisional.

step.name: classify-alerts
step.action: Classify each alert family: actionable / informational / noise (no-op > 50% = noise).
step.decision-gate: Quantitative threshold required; vibes-based classification rejected.

step.name: design-fingerprints
step.action: Per family, choose labels that collapse to one fingerprint.
step.decision-gate: Implicit AlertManager defaults rejected for high-volume alerts.

step.name: split-routing
step.action: Split into page / ticket / silenced routes.
